name: Cloudflare Pay Per Crawl
description: Access web content via Cloudflare's pay-per-crawl system. Websites opt in to charge AI crawlers micropayments instead of blocking them. Returns full page content including behind soft paywalls.
llm_usage_prompt: To use Cloudflare Pay Per Crawl, call https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/examples/pay-per-crawl/ with x402 payment of 0.001 USDC. Send json input. Returns json. Description: Access web content via Cloudflare's pay-per-crawl system. Websites opt in to charge AI crawlers micropayments instead of blocking them. Returns full page content including behind soft paywalls.
sdk_snippet_python:
import requests
# Call Cloudflare Pay Per Crawl
resp = requests.get("https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/examples/pay-per-crawl/")
# Returns 402 with payment info: 1000 USDC micro-units
